Home / Service Areas / San Jose

Plumber in San Jose, CA

Trusted local professionals serving San Jose and surrounding communities

Serving San Jose, CA

Owens Family Plumbers is proud to offer comprehensive plumbing services to the residents and businesses of San Jose, California. From the heart of Silicon Valley to the vibrant neighborhoods, we are committed to providing reliable, efficient, and affordable plumbing solutions. Our team of experienced and licensed plumbers is equipped to handle any plumbing issue, big or small. We understand the unique plumbing needs of San Jose homes and businesses, from older infrastructure in historic districts to modern plumbing systems in newer developments. Owens Family Plumbers is dedicated to ensuring your plumbing systems function flawlessly, providing peace of mind and protecting your property. We're available 24/7 for emergency plumbing repairs, so you can always count on us when you need us most.

San Jose is a large and diverse city with a mix of residential, commercial, and industrial areas, reflecting its status as a major technology hub.

Plumber Services in San Jose

Drain Cleaning

Fast, effective drain cleaning services for homes and businesses in San Jose.

Expert sewer line services in San Jose, including repair, replacement, and cleaning.

Fixture Installation

Professional fixture installation services for kitchens and bathrooms in San Jose homes.

Learn more →

Gas Line Services

Safe and reliable gas line repair, installation, and inspection in San Jose.

Learn more →
